title: Villager Frog House
description: Adds a frog-shaped villager house to mangrove swamps
body:
This mod adds a large frog-shaped house structure that generates in mangrove swamps.
The building is fully decorated and inhabited by villagers.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7edf6346b8302940f1a668ae384f08d6e4b50dbb.jpeg)

Beneath the frog structure, you’ll find a small pond where frogs and tadpoles live.
Inside, the house features multiple rooms, a basement, and a roof area.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/892b5cc7c69c209e5d8bb4e38910893f2642e8fa.jpeg)

All villagers use the swamp variant skin and come with a wide range of professions.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks

special thanks to Belac360!
